title: Dodger
description: Dodger is a client-side Minecraft mod that automatically dodges projectiles from hostile mobs.
body:
Dodger is a client-side Minecraft mod that automatically dodges projectiles from hostile mobs. With intelligent trajectory detection and precise movement algorithms, you'll never get hit by arrows, fireballs, or other projectiles again!

# 🎯 Smart Projectile Detection
• Real-time trajectory analysis - Intercepts and calculates projectile paths  
• Multi-mob support - Works with 11 different hostile mobs  
• Predictive targeting - Knows where projectiles will hit before they do  
• Visual debug overlays - See exactly what the mod is tracking  

# 🏃‍♂️ Intelligent Dodging System
• Minimal movement - Dodges with maximum 1-block displacement  
• Safe positioning - Never moves into lava, void, or dangerous blocks  
• Movement-aware - Considers your current direction to avoid jarring movements  
• Perpendicular dodging - Moves sideways relative to incoming projectiles  

# 🎮 Customizable Configuration
• Per-mob toggles - Enable/disable dodging for specific mobs  
• Debug visualization - Toggle trajectory lines and target boxes  
• Keybind support - Default 'O' key to open settings (customizable)  
• Real-time stats - Track dodges and hits in the HUD  

# 🛡️ Supported Mobs
• Skeleton - Bow attacks  
• Stray - Bow attacks with slowness  
• Pillager - Crossbow bolts  
• Witch - Splash potions  
• Drowned - Trident throws  
• Evoker - Fang attacks  
• Vex - Sword rushes  
• Piglin - Crossbow bolts  
• Ghast - Fireballs  
• Blaze - Fire charges  
• Shulker - Tracking projectiles  

# 🎮 Usage
Quick Start
Install the mod and launch Minecraft
Join any world (works in both Creative and Survival)
Open settings with O key
Enable dodging for desired mobs
Watch as projectiles harmlessly fly past you!
Configuration GUI
Access the configuration screen by:  
• O key - Default keybinding (customizable in Controls)

Settings Include:  
• Enable/disable debug visual overlays  
• Toggle the on-screen HUD  
• View and reset statistics  

Debug Visualization
When enabled, you'll see:  
• Blue boxes - Aggressive mobs targeting you  
• Red lines - Projectile trajectories  
• Red boxes - Predicted impact locations  
• HUD display - Real-time stats and active threats  

# 🔧 Installation
Requirements
• Minecraft 1.21.8 or 1.21.10  
• Fabric Loader 0.16.14+  
• Fabric API 0.129.0+  

Steps
Install Fabric Loader
Download Fabric API
Download Dodger mod
Place both JARs in your mods folder
Launch Minecraft with Fabric profile

# ⚠️ Important Disclaimer
Please read before using:

• **Not 100% Perfect** - The dodging mechanic is not foolproof. You will still occasionally be hit by projectiles due to timing, positioning, or complex scenarios.

• **Server Usage Warning** - This mod may be considered cheating on some public multiplayer servers. We strongly recommend:

- Using it only on local/single-player worlds  
- Checking server rules before use on multiplayer servers  
- Being respectful of server communities and their policies   

• Use Responsibly - This mod is intended for enhancing single-player gameplay and should not be used to gain unfair advantages in competitive multiplayer environments.

# ⚙️ Technical Details
Performance  
• Response Time: <20ms projectile detection  
• Memory Usage: <5MB additional RAM  
• CPU Impact: Minimal overhead during gameplay  
• Network: Client-side only, works on any server  

Compatibility  
• ✅ Single Player - Full feature set  
• ✅ Multiplayer - Complete compatibility  
• ✅ Dedicated Servers - No server-side requirements  
• ✅ Cross-Version - Supports 1.21.8 and 1.21.10  

Safety Features  
The mod includes multiple safety checks:  
• Block validation - Never dodges into dangerous blocks  
• Fall protection - Avoids creating dangerous drops  
• Movement preservation - Maintains your intended direction when possible  
• Multiplayer compatibility - Works on all servers (client-side only)
